goal: Build the local-first DevDrop MVP CLI: initialize a workspace, scan project metadata, generate a manifest, recreate safe placeholder structure, hydrate Git repos manually, manage encrypted env profiles, and document the local demo workflow. Do not build hosted sync, FUSE, a daemon, team secrets, editor settings sync, or dependency auto-install in this run.

cards.title: DevDrop: scaffold Go CLI and init command
cards.task: Create the standalone DevDrop Go CLI and implement `devdrop init --workspace <path>`. Use Go with Cobra. Add root help/version output. Create the workspace root and `<workspace>/.devdrop/`. Create local config/state paths under `~/.devdrop/`. Generate and persist machine metadata: ID, name, OS, arch, workspace root, timestamps. Generate local age key material suitable for later secret encryption. Write the initial workspace manifest with version, machine entry, workspace root, and empty projects. Keep scanning, hydration, and env profile commands out of this card except for interfaces needed by init.
cards.scope: Create the initial Go module, CLI entrypoint, config/state/manifest foundations, tests for init idempotency, and no hosted sync or daemon. Do not implement workspace scan, project hydration, or env profile commands beyond key initialization.

cards.title: DevDrop: manifest model, workspace scan, and status
cards.task: Implement the versioned manifest model, validation, stable JSON read/write, `devdrop workspace scan`, `devdrop status`, and `devdrop project status [project]`. Scanner must detect Git repositories, remotes, current branch, last commit, dirty state, `.env` presence, dependency files, and setup hints. Ignore dependency/build artifacts by default: `node_modules`, `dist`, `build`, `.next`, `turbo`, `target`, `vendor`, `coverage`, `.cache`, `.DS_Store`, `*.log`. Update local state with last scan/check timestamps.
cards.scope: Build on the init/config foundation only. Do not clone repos, decrypt/write secrets, implement remote sync, or delete local files. Include unit tests for manifest validation and scanner behavior.
dependsOn: DevDrop: scaffold Go CLI and init command

cards.title: DevDrop: project add, workspace sync, and Git hydration
cards.task: Implement `devdrop project add <relative-path>`, `devdrop workspace sync --dry-run`, safe non-dry-run sync, and `devdrop project hydrate <project-name-or-id>`. Support Git repos, local-only projects, and metadata-only placeholders. Create missing namespace folders and placeholder project directories. Write `.devdrop-placeholder.json` for non-hydrated projects. Detect path/remote conflicts and report them without overwriting. Hydrate Git projects with normal `git clone <remote> <path>` and remove placeholder metadata only after a successful clone.
cards.scope: Build on the init/config foundation only. Do not implement partial clone, sparse checkout, FUSE, access watchers, destructive deletes, or auto-pull of dirty repos. Integration tests must use a local bare Git repo fixture without network access.
dependsOn: DevDrop: scaffold Go CLI and init command

cards.title: DevDrop: encrypted env profile commands
cards.task: Implement encrypted per-project environment profiles and safe local `.env` generation. Use native Go age encryption. Implement `devdrop env set <project> <key> [--profile dev]`, `devdrop env list <project> [--profile dev]`, and `devdrop env pull <project> [--profile dev]`. Store encrypted profile files under `<workspace>/.devdrop/secrets/<project-id>/<profile>.age`. Preserve profile metadata: project ID, profile name, keys, updated timestamp. Write generated `.env` files with `0600` permissions. Ensure logs/status never expose secret values.
cards.scope: Build on the init/config foundation only. Do not add team/shared secret management, OS keychain integration, rotation, or remote secret sync. Tests must prove encrypted round-trip, value masking, and `.env` permissions.
dependsOn: DevDrop: scaffold Go CLI and init command

cards.title: DevDrop: README, examples, and end-to-end MVP verification
cards.task: Write the README, example manifest, and end-to-end test coverage for the local-only DevDrop prototype. Document `init`, `workspace scan`, `workspace sync --dry-run`, `project add`, `project hydrate`, `env set`, `env list`, `env pull`, and `status`. Add a copy-pasteable temporary-directory demo and a simulated two-workspace flow. Add integration coverage for init workspace A, scan/add projects, use manifest in workspace B, sync placeholders, hydrate a local Git repo, set/pull env, and status reports ready. Document deferred features: Git-backed sync, hosted service, daemon, FUSE, teams, editor settings, dependency auto-install.
cards.scope: Depends on scan/status, hydration, and env commands. Do not implement new product features in this card except test/doc support required for the end-to-end demo. Do not include real secret values in docs or test logs.
dependsOn: DevDrop: manifest model, workspace scan, and status
DevDrop: project add, workspace sync, and Git hydration
